schoolName: NOSM University (Northern Ontario School of Medicine University)
holdReason: Every verifiable NOSM University degree program (MD/UME and the Physician Assistant BScPA) is restricted by NOSM's own official admissions pages, corroborated by independent third-party sources, to Canadian citizens or permanent residents only. There is no international/Indian-student admission stream for any NOSM University program, so no structuredFacts.programs entry with a valid courseSlug (mbbs, medical-pg, bsc-nursing, pharmacy, bds) can be honestly populated. Fabricating one would violate the no-fabrication rule. See nosm-university.md in this folder for full sourced detail.

sources.label: NOSM University - Minimum Requirements (official; MD/UME program - states applicants must be Canadian citizens or permanent residents)
NOSM University - Frequently Asked Questions (official; MD/UME program)
NOSM University - About NOSM University (official; history, founding, DCEL model)
NOSM University - Thunder Bay and Sudbury Campuses (official)
NOSM University - IMG Support and Resources (official; postgraduate residency, not a direct-entry international admissions stream)
Wikipedia - NOSM University (independent corroboration of founding, 2022 independence, campuses)
CBC News - "NOSM University marks 20 years" (independent corroboration of history)
BeMo Academic Consulting - "Northern Ontario School of Medicine: How to Get In" (independent third-party admissions consultant; corroborates citizen/PR-only MD eligibility)
CanadianPA.ca - "Can an IMG become a Physician Assistant?" (independent corroboration of PA program's Canadian citizen/PR-only eligibility)

structuredFacts.name: NOSM University (Northern Ontario School of Medicine University)
structuredFacts.note: No programs array populated - every NOSM University degree program (MD/UME, Physician Assistant BScPA) is restricted to Canadian citizens/permanent residents only per official and independent sources. Postgraduate residency training accepts IMGs but is a post-MD CaRMS-matching process, not a direct-entry study-abroad program comparable to mbbs/medical-pg/bsc-nursing/pharmacy/bds course slugs.

draftContent.note: Narrative fields intentionally left unpopulated. Writing summary/campusLifestyle/clinicalExposure/hostelOverview/indianFoodSupport/safetyOverview/studentSupport copy framed for prospective Indian students would misrepresent an institution whose only degree programs categorically exclude that audience. See nosm-university.md for full research record and sourcing.
